name: Hot Work Permit Drifts Dangerous
description: A hot work permit is approved clean in Zone D; VOC concentration at the Zone C/D boundary then drifts into Warning without the permit being re-checked.

extra_fields.work_description: Grinding on blending line support bracket

steps.note: Hot work permit issued with a clean gas test.
VOC-CONC drifting into Warning after the permit was approved — the permit's paper status hasn't changed.
